summary: Removed all 9 [THINKING-DEBUG] console.warn statements across use-rust-agent.ts (3 blocks), useAgent.ts (3 blocks), LiveStreamingBlock.tsx (1 block), MessageBubble.tsx (1 block), and ThinkingRow.tsx (1 block). Fixed async SolidJS prop in AppDialogs.tsx line 134 — replaced `onSave={async (desc) => { ... }}` with a non-async wrapper that fires the async logic via `void .then()` so SolidJS reactivity tracking is not broken. Added a TODO comment to tauri-agent.ts marking it as dead production code (kept only because tauri-agent.test.ts still imports it — both files should be deleted together after tests are migrated to use-rust-agent.ts). Lint warnings reduced from 114 to 109. The single pre-existing solid/prefer-for error in AppearanceTab.tsx was not in scope and was not touched.
notes: The 1 lint error (solid/prefer-for in AppearanceTab.tsx) is pre-existing and was not in scope for this task.
tauri-agent.ts was not deleted because tauri-agent.test.ts imports it — a note is added to the file and both should be removed together.
All console.warn('[THINKING-DEBUG]') calls are removed; the adjacent debugLog() calls using the conditional debug logger are preserved.
